name: Medinotec Inc.
business: Medinotec Inc. generates revenue from internally designed and manufactured proprietary medical devices (Trachealator, Outflo Aortic Valve Dilation Balloon Catheter, Cape Cross PTCA catheters) and distribution of third-party medical products under exclusive or non-exclusive agreements, primarily in South Africa and selected international markets.

exposures.sentence: We currently generate revenue from two principal sources: (1) internally designed and manufactured proprietary medical devices and (2) distribution of third-party medical products under exclusive or non-exclusive agreements in defined territories.

catalysts.event: Launch of Outflo in the United States market
catalysts.sentence: The Company expects these efforts, together with the fiscal 2027 launch of OutFlo in the United States market, to support revenue growth in that segment during fiscal 2027.
